era: 1991-2003 core. Grunge/Alt. E=6 -- heavy side of catalog. Arrangement density over tonal aggression. Capitol Hill.

theory_nodes.concept: Heavy through arrangement density, not tonal aggression. Truly at E=6 is heavier because the parts are denser and the rhythm section pushes harder -- not because the guitar tone is more aggressive. Alt-Rock remains Alt-Rock even at E=6.
theory_nodes.description: The compositional vs. tonal approach to heaviness.

theory_nodes.concept: Personnel lineage: Soundgarden (Yamamoto) + Screaming Trees (Pickerel) + Skin Yard (Roth). Three lineage threads in one rhythm section. Capitol Hill technical tradition carried forward.
theory_nodes.description: Truly as a convergence of three major Seattle lineages.

theory_nodes.concept: 220-302-326 arc: three degrees document three aspects of Truly. E=5 crystalline alt, grunge placement, E=6 heavy fusion. The complete Truly picture requires all three entries.
theory_nodes.description: Multi-entry documentation of a complex catalog.

cross_references.relationship: E=5, first entry. Crystalline alt-rock. The 220-302-326 arc complete.
Second entry. Grunge catalog placement. Post-grunge Capitol Hill.
Hiro Yamamoto founding member. Capitol Hill summit band provides Yamamoto.
Mark Pickerel prior band. Eastern WA precision dynamics into Capitol Hill alt-rock.
E=7 to E=6. Sub Pop to Island. U-District to Capitol Hill. Energy steps down.
E=6 holds. Capitol Hill continues. Post-grunge sequence.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6 + E=7. Compositional precision vs. sustained meteorological force. Truly's controlled arrangement density against the Douglas Fir's gale-driven moan-roar. E=13.

milestones: HEAVY ALT-ROCK VS. TONAL GRUNGE DOCUMENTED
